title: Booked invoice totals GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of the totals of booked invoices.

netAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The total invoice amount for all booked invoices in the base currency of the agreement before all taxes and discounts have been applied.

maxDate.description: The latest date of any booked invoice.

minDate.description: The earliest date of any booked invoice.

customers.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked customer resource.

accountingYears.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked accounting years resource.

periods.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked periods resource.

employees.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked employees resource.

paid.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked paid resource.

unpaid.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid resource.

self.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked resource.
